body:
- Adds microphysics parameters
 - Exports turbulence function stubs and adds values for turbulence parameters
 - Removes concrete types, which can be defined from the caller
 - Renames file `EarthParameters` -> `PlanetParameters`
 - Tests are more automated now, they grab all methods in each module
title: Add microphysics params, default turbulence vals, remove concrete types

body: Adds correctness tests for parameter sets that relations (and not just hard-coded values).
title: Add correctness test for relations
